creator: fbsd@opal.com
text:
Pull-down menus appear behind Flash content in Firefox-3.5

How-To-Repeat: Install ports:
firefox-3.5.1,1
linux-flashplugin-9.0r159
nspluginwrapper-1.2.2_2

Visit suitable URL, e.g.:
http://finance.yahoo.com/echarts?s=CSCO#chart1:symbol=csco;range=1d;indicator=volume;charttype=line;crosshair=on;ohlcvalues=0;logscale=on;source=undefined

Try some of the pull-down menus at the top of the chart, e.g., EVENTS,
TECHNICAL INDICATORS, CHART SETTINGS.

Observe that the content of the pull-down menu is hidden behind the
Flash chart.
